questions.question: Which state won in the Goalball nationals held recently in Rohatak?
questions.explanation: Goalball is a Paralympic sport, it is specially designed for blind people of a certain age. Goalball Federation of India held Goalball nationals at Maharishi Dayanand University in Rohtak recently. In the finals, Maharashtra beat Uttarakhand.

questions.question: ‘Ulf Kristersson’ has been elected as the new Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: Sweden’s parliament has elected a new Prime Minister ‘Ulf Kristersson’ the conservative Moderate Party leader as Prime Minister at the head of a centre-right coalition. Though three-party coalition does not have a majority, Prime Ministers in Sweden can govern as long as there is no parliamentary majority against them.

questions.question: Deesa, where the foundation stone for a new air base has been recently laid, is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi laid the foundation stone for a new air base at Deesa in Banaskantha district of north Gujarat near the India-Pakistan border. Deesa is a greenfield air base spread over an area of over 4500 acres, which is expected to be ready by December 2023. According to reports, after its completion, the air base will reduce the long pending strategic gap of 355 kilometers between the Air Force stations in Bhuj and Uttarlai.

questions.question: Liz Truss recently resigned as the Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: British Prime Minister Liz Truss has announced that she will step down from the position leader of the Conservative Party after her policies triggered economic turmoil and divided the party. Truss, who has been prime minister for just 45 days, also announced that she will remain as prime minister and party leader until a successor is chosen.

questions.question: What is the rank of India in the global research on the rise of centi-millionaires?
questions.explanation: India ranks third in the world’s first-ever global research on the rise of centi-millionaires, according to a new survey by advisory firm Henley & Partners. Centi-millionaires are individuals with assets worth more than Rs. 830 crore (USD 100 million). India has 1,132 of the world’s 25,490 centi-millionaires, as it outnumbers countries such as the UK, Russia, and Switzerland. USA and China are in the first two places.

questions.question: Which state has launched a website to publicly display the names of polluting industrial units?
questions.explanation: The Jharkhand government has launched a website to publicly display the names of polluting industrial units in the state. As per the Jharkhand State Pollution Control Board, the website for the Star Rating Program aims to hold the industries accountable for the particulate matter they release into the atmosphere.

questions.question: Zosterops paruhbesar or the Wangi-wangi white-eye Bird, which was reently discovered is endemic to which country?
questions.explanation: Zosterops paruhbesar or the Wangi-wangi white-eye Bird, which was recently discovered has been recommended the ‘Endangered’ IUCN status. The bird is distinct both morphologically and genetically from other members of the Zosterops genus. The new species is restricted to Wangi-wangi, a single island in the Wakatobi Archipelago, Indonesia.

questions.question: Which state passed an ordinance to increase the reservation for the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes to 17 % and 7 %?
questions.explanation: Karnataka Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot gave assent to the ordinance to increase the reservation for the Scheduled Castes from 15 per cent to 17 per cent and the Scheduled Tribes from 3 per cent to 7 per cent in the state. The Karnataka cabinet approved an ordinance for increasing the reservation for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribe communities.

questions.question: Which state’s Governor has directed Vice Chancellors (VC) of nine universities of the state to tender resignation citing Supreme Court Orders?
questions.explanation: Kerala Governor Arif Mohammed Khan has directed the Vice Chancellors (VC) of nine universities in Kerala to tender their resignation, citing a Supreme Court judgment. There has been an ongoing tussle between Kerala Governor and the Pinarayi Vijayan-led state government. After the VCs approached the Kerala High Court challenging the order, the court has now ruled that they can continue in their posts.

questions.question: Minicoy Thundi Beach and Kadmat Beach, which were added to the list of ‘Blue Flag Beaches’, are located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Two beaches from Lakshadweep Minicoy Thundi Beach and Kadmat Beach were added to the list of ‘Blue Beaches’. It is an eco-label given to the cleanest beaches in the world by the Foundation for Environment Education (FEE). With this, India now has 12 beaches certified under the Blue Flag Certification. Spain with 729 sites tops the list of countries with Blue Flag awarded sites.
